governance.slo: All dogfood cases pass before protocol-changing release
exit_criteria: All P0/P1 adjustments have at least one passing dogfood case
Failed dogfood case maps to source_adjustment and expected behavior
Protocol-changing release cannot skip dogfood suite without waiver

dogfood_cases.scenario: Evidence record with old task_sha256 should not close current gate
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: wait-gate reports stale_verdict and does not pass gate

dogfood_cases.scenario: Evidence with only a transport notification cannot satisfy review/test gate
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: wait-gate blocks; transport DONE does not equal gate pass

dogfood_cases.scenario: Destructive action without dry_run or recoverability blocks validation
Review pass without evidence_level cannot satisfy outcome_quality gate
Improvement task without quality_outcome fails validation
Child slice pass but parent done criteria unmet blocks parent_done
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: audit blocks parent_done without evidenced criteria

dogfood_cases.scenario: Gate role identity mismatch and write policy violations are detected
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: validate and audit block on identity mismatch and write violations

dogfood_cases.scenario: Compact evidence summary preserves durable refs without raw content
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: compact-evidence output has sha256 refs and no raw secrets

dogfood_cases.scenario: Runtime binding and reconcile summary detect model/build drift
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: audit reports model_drift and build_drift warnings

dogfood_cases.scenario: Decision records persist in evidence and handoff reports active decisions
dogfood_cases.expected_outcome: handoff includes decision_record_summary with active decisions

dogfood_cases.scenario: Parent goal user_next_action visible in handoff
